page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 56 dedicated physical cores and 56 vCPUs, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 224.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks show a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as demonstrated by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling in the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression ranking in the bottom 10%. However, the high core count compensates in parallel workloads, delivering average multi-core CPU performance in stress-ng and Geekbench multi-core tests. Notably, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performs strongly, placing in the top 25% of tested systems. Memory bandwidth and database operations, such as Redis SET, consistently register in the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.sn2.13xlarge offers a high-density, dedicated resource profile suitable for multi-threaded workloads that do not require high single-core clock speeds. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-effective option for compute-heavy, parallelizable tasks that leverage network storage. Appropriate workloads include multi-threaded data decompression, static web serving, medium-scale database operations, and parallelized general-purpose application hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 56 dedicated vCPUs and physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it provides 224.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance includes no local storage or GPU accelerators, but offers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates weak single-core performance but average multi-core capabilities, highlighted by strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallelized workloads that do not depend on high single-thread speeds. It is well-suited for multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and general-purpose application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 56 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 224 GB of RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for parallelized multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: A dedicated multi core platform offering balanced memory to CPU allocation designed for highly parallelized and network reliant general purpose workloads.

224.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPUs
Strong multi-threaded decompression and average multi-core benchmark performance
Best suited for parallelized data processing, static web serving, and general-purpose hosting
